description: The image presents two adjacent spatial representations, likely illustrating land cover information for a 2560x2560m reference sample cell, showing woody versus non-woody vegetation. The left panel displays a thematic land cover map where green areas represent woody vegetation and grey areas represent non-woody vegetation. The boundaries between these classes are outlined with a darker contour. This panel depicts the final content of the reference database for land cover information. The right panel displays a corresponding binary mask in black and white, representing the same or a very similar area. In this mask, black pixels indicate the presence of woody vegetation, and white pixels indicate non-woody areas. This panel likely illustrates an intermediate product or the Very High Resolution (VHR) imagery data (as a binary mask) used as a guiding reference for visual assessment and correction during the generation of the reference dataset. Both panels show complex, irregular patterns characteristic of natural landscapes.
